{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Varic's wand
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Varic]] uses a wand to cast magic.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
